evals.name: english-startup-suggestions
evals.prompt: Suggest some domain names for my AI sales assistant. Prefer .com or .ai.
evals.expected_output: Triggers domain-suggest, generates candidates with multiple techniques, verifies availability via the domain-check script, and returns a ranked shortlist grouped by zone with rationales.

evals.name: russian-project-brainstorm
evals.prompt: Придумай домен для нового проекта про доставку еды.
evals.expected_output: Triggers domain-suggest, asks at most one short clarifying question if needed, generates and verifies candidates, and answers in Russian.

evals.name: more-variants-with-keyword
evals.prompt: Подбери ещё варианты доменов со словом care, без help.
evals.expected_output: Triggers domain-suggest, generates care-based candidates honoring the exclude constraint, verifies availability, and lists available options.

evals.name: name-the-company
evals.prompt: Help me name my fintech startup and find an available domain. Short, brandable, no hyphens.
evals.expected_output: Triggers domain-suggest, applies SMILE/SCRATCH and constraints, generates brandable coined/suggestive names, checks availability, and recommends a top pick plus runner-up.

evals.name: negative-exact-check
evals.prompt: Is example-test-2026.ru available? Check exactly this name.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT trigger domain-suggest because exact domains were provided for an availability check; routes to domain-check instead.

evals.name: negative-registration
evals.expected_output: Does NOT trigger domain-suggest; this is a registration/purchase request outside the skill's scope.

evals.name: negative-dns
evals.prompt: Change the NS records for example.ru to Cloudflare.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT trigger domain-suggest; this is DNS management outside the skill's scope.
